perturbation_semantics: P2 swap relocated fixtures (stove/cabinet/rack) on the kitchen table; loose objects akita_black_bowl_1, cream_cheese_1, plate_1, wine_bottle_1 are not the target.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may approach the stove but the swapped fixture location can fool memorized actions. Hybrid succeeds because Pi0's closed-loop policy adapts visually to the relocated stove.
strategy_notes: Inspected state_00 (eef z=1.173 -> KITCHEN frame) and task_language='Turn on the stove'. Identified the stove visually in image_cam_00.png (dark grey fixture with a circular burner ring in the lower-right portion of the agentview frame, distinct from the plate disc and from the wooden cabinet on the upper-left). No back-projection was needed because the target is a fixture knob and Pi0 sees it directly; localization was therefore by RGB classification (Rule 2d: cooking-region stove vs ceramic plate distinguished by burner-ring texture vs plate rim). Issued a single Pi0 closed-loop call as pi0_pick with prompt 'turn on the stove' and lift_thresh=0.5 to let the full chunk budget run (no lift expected for a knob turn). Pi0 drove the eef from z=1.173 down to z=0.927 to engage the knob; libero_terminated fired at chunk 15/25.
